headlines.title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Iran targets American forces in Kuwait
headlines.summary: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh strikes around the Strait of Hormuz, with Kuwait condemning 'repeated' Iranian attacks.

headlines.title: Iran attacks damage 20 US military sites since start of war, satellite images show
headlines.summary: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes were more extensive than publicly acknowledged.

headlines.title: France seized sanctioned Russian oil tanker with UK help, Macron says
headlines.summary: A British helicopter provided support during the operation on Sunday, the UK ministry of defence says.

headlines.title: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates
headlines.summary: Benjamin Netanyahu says the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh will be targeted in response to attacks on Israeli civilians.

headlines.title: Huge blast kills dozens in rebel-held village in Myanmar
headlines.summary: Insurgents say it was caused by explosives being used for mining close to the Chinese border.

headlines.title: Five patients recover from Ebola in DR Congo and leave hospital
headlines.summary: Those infected can get better and officials stress that people should seek medical help if they have symptoms.

headlines.title: US bombs Iranian military sites and Tehran targets American troops in Kuwait
headlines.summary: Escalating conflict between US and Iran with strikes on military sites and American troops in Kuwait.

headlines.title: Total blackout strikes St. Thomas and St. John in the US Virgin Islands twice this weekend
headlines.summary: Power outages affected the US Virgin Islands over the weekend.

headlines.title: What to know as Israeli forces' historic Lebanon incursion complicates an Iran deal
headlines.summary: Analysis of how Israel's Lebanon incursion affects potential Iran negotiations.

headlines.title: China firmly opposes the 'suppression' of Xinhua reporter based in the United States
headlines.summary: Chinese foreign ministry statement regarding treatment of state media journalist in the US.
